entry.title: The gala has a date
entry.summary: Lighting the Way returns October 17 at Grace Community Church Hall. Tickets are $50 and tables are open. One night funds the whole year of showing up.

entry.title: A win worth naming
entry.summary: The state bill requiring trauma informed foster parent training was signed in January. It is a floor, not a ceiling, and the next push is caseload caps.

entry.title: What the monthly group taught us in January
entry.summary: This month the theme was navigating systems as a young adult, the concrete stuff of identification, paperwork, and who to call. Concrete beats abstract every time.

entry.title: Case for Kids, where it stands
entry.summary: Our campaign to cap caseloads at twelve is heading toward testimony. The draft is tightening and the coalition is growing.
